command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: An implementation-heavy refund escalation console for reviewing R-1842, exposing raw case fields, validation diagnostics, system traces, CRUD controls, and handoff decisions.
parsed.css: .refund-admin{font-family:Inter,Arial,sans-serif;background:#f6f7f9;color:#17202a;min-height:100vh;padding:24px;box-sizing:border-box}.topbar{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:24px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:18px}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 6px;color:#687385;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.topbar h1{margin:0;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:0}.topbar p{margin:8px 0 0;color:#4b5565;max-width:720px;line-height:1.45}.status-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border:1px solid #d6a85b;background:#fff7e8;color:#6f4700;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap}.layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:270px minmax(420px,1fr) 360px;gap:16px}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d9dee7;border-radius:8px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(22,32,42,.04)}.panel h2{font-size:15px;margin:0 0 12px}.queue-item{width:100%;text-align:left;border:1px solid #dfe4ed;background:#fafbfc;border-radius:7px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px}.queue-item.active{border-color:#2e6fdb;background:#eef5ff}.row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center}.muted{color:#6b7280}.amount{font-weight:800}.field-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:160px 1fr;gap:8px 12px;font-size:14px}.field-grid dt{color:#667085}.field-grid dd{margin:0;font-weight:650}.evidence-list{margin:0;padding-left:18px;line-height:1.55}.warning{border-left:4px solid #d8902f;background:#fff8ec;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:6px;margin-top:12px}.actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-top:12px}.actions button,.decision button,.crud button{border:1px solid #cfd6e2;background:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:10px 12px;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937}.decision{display:grid;gap:8px}.decision .approve{background:#e8f7ee;border-color:#8ccaa3}.decision .policy{background:#eef4ff;border-color:#9ebcf2}.decision .return{background:#fff3e6;border-color:#e5b56f}.handoff{background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #d9dee7;border-radius:7px;padding:12px;margin-top:12px}.diagnostics{display:grid;gap:10px}.diag-block{border:1px solid #e2e7f0;border-radius:7px;padding:10px;background:#fbfcfe}.diag-block h3{font-size:13px;margin:0 0 8px;color:#344054}.code{font-family:Menlo,Consolas,monospace;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;color:#263445}.error{color:#9a3412;font-weight:700}.ok{color:#166534;font-weight:700}.table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px}.table th,.table td{border-bottom:1px solid #e5e9f0;text-align:left;padding:8px 6px}.table th{color:#667085;font-weight:700}.crud{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-top:10px}@media(max-width:1100px){.layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}.topbar{flex-direction:column}.status-pill{white-space:normal}}
parsed.html:
refund_case CRUD workspace

Refund Escalation Review

Support operations manager review for escalation R-1842. Decide whether to approve, send to policy review, or return to the support agent for missing evidence while the raw model diagnostics remain visible.

Evidence incomplete

Queue

Selected refund_case table fields

id
R-1842
customer
Nora Diaz
plan
Pro annual
amount
$184.20
request
Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.
status
Evidence incomplete
policy
Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

Evidence records

  • Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
  • Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
  • Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
Blocking validation: receipt_photo is required before manager approval. Current recommended next action is return to support agent for missing evidence.

Decision and handoff

Handoff draft

Next action: Return to support agent for receipt photo. Reason: renewal date and customer reason are present, but manager approval requires complete evidence.

JSON schema validation errors

refund_case.evidence[2].receipt_photo: required field missing
decision.approve.allowed: false until evidence_complete=true

Prompt template version

refund_escalation_manager.v3.2.1

Tool call results

purchase_history.lookup: renewal confirmed
support_notes.fetch: refund reason captured
receipt_store.lookup: no receipt photo found

Resource id and API endpoint status

resource_id: refund_case/R-1842
GET /api/refund-cases/R-1842: 200 synced
PATCH /api/refund-cases/R-1842: 409 evidence incomplete

Queue table snapshot

idstateamount
R-1842Needs receipt$184.20
R-1843Policy question$89.00
R-1844Manager review$312.75
